span.p:
The config DECIDES, then the flow BRANCHES. Standard models (ATT/ATE/DID/pre-post) share
one pipeline and fan out with for_each. LME is structurally different (multi performance period),
so it breaks off into its OWN workstream with its OWN notebooks and can diverge freely.
Add another odd-shaped model = another branch + workstream. Add a standard model = a leaf + a config row.

svg.text: MODULAR — config-driven BRANCH: standard for_each loop + separate LME workstream
